theme: Tìm hiểu văn hoá công ty

vocab.example: I read that your core values include honesty and teamwork.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đọc được rằng giá trị cốt lõi của công ty là trung thực và làm việc nhóm.

vocab.example: I'm curious about the work environment on your team.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi tò mò về môi trường làm việc trong đội của anh/chị.

vocab.meaning_vi: cân bằng công việc - cuộc sống
vocab.example: How would you describe work-life balance here?
vocab.example_vi: Anh/chị có thể mô tả sự cân bằng công việc - cuộc sống ở đây không?

vocab.example: I read that the team is very collaborative.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đọc được rằng đội này rất có tính hợp tác.

vocab.example: I want to make sure I would fit in well here.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn chắc chắn rằng mình sẽ hòa nhập tốt ở đây.

vocab.example: I really connected with your company's mission statement.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi thực sự đồng cảm với tuyên ngôn sứ mệnh của công ty.

vocab.example: Could you tell me about the manager's management style?
vocab.example_vi: Anh/chị có thể cho tôi biết về phong cách quản lý của quản lý trực tiếp không?

vocab.example: I noticed the team is quite diverse.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi nhận thấy đội ngũ khá đa dạng.

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: Do you have any questions about our company before we finish?

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, could you tell me about the team's core values?

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: Of course. We value honesty, teamwork, and continuous learning.

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: That's great. What's the work environment like day to day?

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: It's quite relaxed, but people work hard to meet deadlines.

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: I see. How would you describe work-life balance here?

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: We try to keep it balanced with flexible working hours.

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: Good to know. Is the team collaborative when solving problems?

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: Yes, very collaborative. We also have quite a diverse team.

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: That's reassuring. I really connected with your mission statement online.

lines.speaker: Lan (interviewer)
lines.text: Glad to hear that. Anything about our management style you'd like to know?

lines.speaker: Duc (candidate)
lines.text: I'm hoping to fit in well and grow with the team.

questions.q: What does Duc first ask about?
How does Lan describe the team?
What does Duc say he read about the company?

shadowing: Could you tell me about the team's core values and daily habits?
What's the work environment like for people on this team?
How would you describe work-life balance for someone in this role?
I noticed the team seems collaborative and quite diverse online.
I really connected with your company's mission statement and values.
